content: I am a graduate student at NYU Tandon School specialising in Cybersecurity. My research interests are Cryptography, Application Security, Network Security and AR/VR. I have worked in software development for Oracle FSGBU. Currently I work part-time at the AR/VR lab at NYU College of Dentistry.
